title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXXIV. Games.
content:
Awake, arise, pull out your eyes,
            And hear what time of day;
        And when you have done, pull out your tongue,
            And see what you can say.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. CCLXXXIV. Games."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
